
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick all objects with white parts and place them on the floor

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Evidence: From the current visual perception, I observe several objects on the table. I need to identify which of these objects have white parts. The Cup\_45 clearly has white parts. The Tape\_4 appears to have some white on it. The Plate\_57 is red, so no white. The Glass\_37 is red, so no white. The PeanutButter\_8 has a white lid. The Painkiller\_23 has a white lid. The Pills\_20 container is white. The Battery\_3 and Battery\_30 are mostly dark. The Lighter\_27 is mostly dark. The WineBottle\_36 is dark. The IndoorPlant\_50 is green and brown. The Binoculars\_21 are dark. The Flashlight\_2 is dark. The Screwdriver\_5 is dark. The Lock\_0 and Lock\_18 are dark. The Key\_34 is dark. The TomatoSoup\_19 is red. Hypothesis: Objects with white parts are Cup\_45, Tape\_4, PeanutButter\_8, Painkiller\_23, Pills\_20. Verification step: I will look closer at Tape\_4 to confirm the white part. Decision and next action: Look at Tape\_4 to verify white parts before picking. 

I will now look at Tape\_4 \(position x=\-0.17, y=0.88, z=\-0.6\) to verify the white parts.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": -0.17,
  "y": 0.88,
  "z": -0.6
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1179.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 121034453, 't1': 121035632, 'elapsed': 1179}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6553, completion=324, total=6877
</details>

</details>

<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Evidence: From the closer look, Tape\_4 has a white part. The other objects previously identified \(Cup\_45, PeanutButter\_8, Painkiller\_23, Pills\_20\) also visually have white parts. Decision: I will pick all these objects with white parts. Next action: I will pick Cup\_45 first and then place it on the floor at reference point P0 \(x=\-0.9, y=0.08, z=0.98\) to clear the table progressively.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "Cup_45"
}
```
